'''Crustai''' was the second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Crustai system/Legends|Crustai system]] in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]]. It was part of the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]].

==History==
The planet was discovered by the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] some time before [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]], and selected as a site for the establishment of a colony.<ref name="TEA" /> The name was given by the survey team, and was an acronym in [[Cheunh/Legends|Cheunh]], although what it meant is not known. By 27 BBY, the system was home to some scout teams, and also to the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] headquarters of the frontier patrol unit known as [[Picket Force Two/Legends|Picket Force Two]] under [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Mitth'raw'nuruodo]].

Fifty years later, in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]], it was at Crustai that [[Dean Jinzler]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Mara Jade Skywalker]], and the so-called [[Geroon Remnant]] joined ''[[Chaf Envoy]]'' for its fateful trip into [[The Redoubt/Legends|the Redoubt]].
